mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.phone AS user_phone, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_phone, o.address_detail, o.tracking_no, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders o INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM orders o INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT FROM orders o INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address_detail, tracking_no, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{addressDetail}, #{trackingNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND status = #{status}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS sales FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE DATE(o.created_at) >= #{startDate} AND o.status != 3 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
